name: Icon

styling.text: color prop / className

accessibility.focusManagement: Accepts onClick and aria-label for accessibility

description: Flexible icon wrapper that renders Lucide icons or custom SVG children

name: TrustBadge

styling.text: text-white font-medium text-sm

description: Displays a trust indicator with icon and text in a pill-shaped badge

name: ArtistBioModal

styling.background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(...darker, 0.3) 0%, rgb(...darker/0.92) 40%, rgb(...darker/0.95) 100%) with backdrop-blur
styling.text: various classes defined in CSS module

accessibility.focusManagement: Focus trap implementation, ESC to close, keyboard navigation between focusable elements

description: Full-featured modal displaying artist biography with photo, specialties, portfolio, and booking CTAs

name: BeforeAfterCard

styling.background: bg-deep-black/90 on labels, linear gradient on caption
styling.radius: rounded-2xl on container, rounded-full on labels
styling.padding: px-0 py-0 on labels, p-8 on caption
styling.text: text-white text-sm on labels, text-lg font-bold on title

accessibility.focusManagement: Keyboard navigation with arrow keys, focus outline on slider

description: Interactive before/after image comparison slider with draggable handle and keyboard controls

name: ArtistCard

styling.text: Various sizes from CSS module - white/gold accent colors

accessibility.focusManagement: Keyboard navigation with Enter/Space, tabIndex=0 when clickable

description: Artist profile card with image, role, specialties, and action buttons for booking and gallery

name: ServiceCards

styling.background: backgroundSize: cover with gradient overlays (linear-gradient to bottom, transparent 0%, rgb(0 0 0 / 0.9) 100%)
styling.text: Playfair Display for labels, Poppins for titles, Inter for bullets

description: Grid of service offering cards with background images, pricing, and feature lists

name: ContactInfoCard

styling.text: text-brand-chrome text-sm for title, text-white text-base for value

accessibility.focusManagement: Standard link focus behavior when href provided

description: Contact information display card with icon, title, and value (optionally linkable)

name: CookieConsentBanner

styling.background: bg-(--color-surface-dark)/95 backdrop-blur-lg for banner, bg-brand-background for dialog
styling.border: border-t border-brand-accent/20 on banner, border border-brand-chrome/20 on dialog
styling.radius: rounded-lg on buttons, rounded-xl on dialog
styling.padding: p-8 on banner, p-8 on dialog
styling.text: text-brand-accent for heading, text-brand-white for body, text-sm for descriptions

accessibility.focusManagement: Radix UI Dialog handles focus management

description: GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with customizable preferences and localStorage persistence

name: FAQItem

styling.text: text-lg font-medium text-brand-accent for question, text-white/80 for answer

description: Expandable FAQ accordion item with smooth height transitions

name: FocusTrap

styling.text: n/a

accessibility.focusManagement: Uses @react-aria/focus FocusScope - contains focus within children, restores focus on unmount, auto-focuses first element

description: Accessibility utility that traps keyboard focus within its children (for modals/dialogs)

name: GDPRCompliance

props.interface: No props - FC with no parameters

styling.text: n/a

description: Logic-only component that disables third-party tracking when cookie consent is not given

name: LanguageToggle

styling.background: rgba(var(--color-text-primary-rgb), 0.1) container, var(--brand-accent) for sliding pill
styling.text: color changes between var(--deep-black) and var(--color-text-primary) based on active state

description: Animated language toggle between German and English with sliding gold pill indicator

name: MainNavigation

props.interface: No props interface - uses context internally

styling.background: rgba(var(--color-surface-darker-rgb), 0.4) default, 0.6 when scrolled, with backdrop-blur
styling.shadow: box-shadow changes on scroll and hover states
styling.text: text-brand-accent for logo, text-white for links

accessibility.focusManagement: Focus trap in mobile menu, keyboard navigation, ESC to close

description: Responsive main navigation with glassmorphism, mobile menu, language toggle, and scroll-based transitions

name: NewsletterForm

styling.background: bg-white/10 on input, bg-[var(--brand-accent)] on button
styling.padding: px-4 py-3 on input, px-6 py-3 on button
styling.text: text-white for input, placeholder-white/50, text-sm for errors

description: Newsletter subscription form with email validation, error handling, and success states

name: PriceCard

styling.text: text-[var(--brand-accent)] text-[31px] font-bold for title, text-white for description

description: Pricing tier card with icon, features list, and CTA button

name: ProcessStepCard

styling.text: text-white for number, text-[var(--brand-accent)] for icon and active title, text-white for inactive title

description: Process step indicator with number, icon, title, description, and vertical connector line

name: ReviewCard

styling.text: text-white text-sm-15

description: Customer review card with star rating, content, author name, and source

name: ServiceCard

styling.text: text-brand-accent or text-brand-chrome based on variant for title, text-sm md:text-base for description

accessibility.focusManagement: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--brand-accent)] on button, tabIndex=0, onKeyDown for Enter/Space

name: StatsBar

styling.text: text-[var(--brand-accent)] font-bold text-xl md:text-2xl for value, text-white text-sm for label

description: Statistics bar displaying multiple stat items in a horizontal grid with icons

name: TrustBadgeCarousel

styling.text: inherited from TrustBadge atoms

accessibility.focusManagement: Respects prefers-reduced-motion, uses IntersectionObserver to pause when off-screen
